explanation:
**Pet care** follows international veterinary guidelines (WSAVA, AAHA). Nutrition, vaccination, and deworming protocols vary by species, breed, weight, and age.

## How This Calculator Works

Guinea pigs require 10-30mg/kg of body weight in vitamin C daily. Unlike most mammals, guinea pigs cannot synthesize vitamin C internally, making dietary sources essential. This is a completely free calculator.

This calculator applies the standard formula with your input values, verifying against typical ranges and alerting you to values outside recommended limits.

## Final Notes

This calculation is a reference guide only. For critical decisions (nutritional, medical, or health-related), consult a qualified veterinarian. Values are current as of 2026 and reviewed regularly to ensure accuracy.

faq.q: How much vitamin C does my guinea pig need daily?
faq.a: Guinea pigs require 10-30mg of vitamin C per kilogram of body weight each day. This varies based on age, health status, and overall diet composition.

faq.q: Why can't guinea pigs make their own vitamin C?
faq.a: Unlike most animals, guinea pigs lack the enzyme L-gulonolactone oxidase needed to synthesize vitamin C. They must obtain it entirely from food or supplements.

faq.q: How do I use this calculator?
faq.a: Enter your guinea pig's weight in kilograms and the desired vitamin C dosage (typically 10-30mg/kg/day). The calculator will show the total daily requirement.

faq.q: What's the difference between the minimum and maximum dosage?
faq.a: The 10mg/kg minimum maintains baseline health, while 30mg/kg is the upper recommended range. Most guinea pigs thrive at 15-25mg/kg depending on diet.

faq.q: What are signs of vitamin C deficiency in guinea pigs?
faq.a: Symptoms include lethargy, loss of appetite, rough fur, bleeding gums, and joint problems. Increase vitamin C through bell peppers, cilantro, and parsley, and consult a vet.

faq.q: Is this calculator accurate for all guinea pig breeds?
faq.a: Yes, the formula applies universally to all guinea pig breeds. However, individual needs may vary based on health conditions, age, and current diet. Consult your veterinarian for personalized guidance.
Yes, all our calculators are 100% free and require no registration or account setup.

faq.q: Do you store or share my data?
faq.a: No. All calculations happen directly in your browser. We never send your data to our servers or share it with third parties.
